response.justification: The candidate is a senior software engineer with extensive experience, but their background is almost entirely in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang). They fundamentally lack the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience, especially on the Windows platform, which is the core requirement of the role. Their single, brief C++ role was nearly a decade ago. While they have some fintech experience, it was not in a C++ environment and lacks the specific Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise required.
strengths: Extensive tenure as a senior software developer across various stacks.
Demonstrates strong communication skills through public speaking and workshops.
Has some experience in the broader finance/investment industry.
concerns: Virtually no professional C++ experience; the role requires 5-10 years.
Lacks the required Windows platform development experience.
No demonstrated experience in the specific domains of Capital Markets or Fixed Income.
